package rulefixtures

import (
	"path/filepath"
)

// scenario for filepath_join_with_user_path: `filepath.Join(baseDir, userInput)` without subsequent `filepath.Rel` or path-containment validation
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario710Positive(base string, userInput string) string {
	return filepath.Join(base, userInput)
}
